# Horizon Care Services

> Registered health and social care provider operating across England. We deliver staffing solutions, home care, and specialist support. Company No. 14615041. Regulated by the Care Quality Commission (CQC). Formerly known as Horizon Care Services at horizon-careservices.co.uk — same organisation, new domain.

Horizon Care Services is a professional care organisation with several years of operating experience. We work with NHS trusts, local authorities, families, and care organisations across Bedfordshire, Buckinghamshire, Cambridgeshire, Hertfordshire, Manchester, and London.

Our practice is built on three principles: strength-based care planning that starts from what a person can do and what matters to them; joined-up working alongside NHS teams, social workers, GPs, and families; and honest communication at every stage.

## Services

- [Staffing Solutions](https://www.horizoncareservices.org/services/staffing/): Registered nurses, healthcare assistants, support workers, social workers, occupational therapists, and physiotherapists. Available for single shifts, long-term contracts, and short-notice cover around the clock.
- [Home Care](https://www.horizoncareservices.org/services/home-care/): Personal care, medication management, companionship, and respite support delivered in the client's own home. Consistent, familiar carers wherever possible.
- [Specialist Care](https://www.horizoncareservices.org/services/specialist/): Specialist support for people living with dementia and Alzheimer's, and for those with life-limiting conditions — including hospice and end-of-life care delivered with real sensitivity.

## About

- [About Horizon Care Services](https://www.horizoncareservices.org/about/): Background, regulatory status, approach, and information for NHS and local authority referrers.
- [Referrals](https://www.horizoncareservices.org/referrals/): How discharge planners and social workers can refer. We respond within 2 working days and provide clear written assessments.
- [Work For Us](https://www.horizoncareservices.org/work-for-us/): Career opportunities for nurses, healthcare assistants, and support workers.

## Contact

- Service areas: Bedfordshire, Buckinghamshire, Cambridgeshire, Hertfordshire, Manchester, London — and broader England on request
